summary: Add session creation, session participant snapshots, teacher session access, and final record submission behavior.

steps.name: implement-session-creation
steps.summary: Added sessions and participant snapshot schema, operator session creation rules, and dashboard creation flow with snapshot tests.

steps.name: build-teacher-session-workspace
steps.summary: Built teacher-only session list and detail workspace with assignment-scoped access checks and URL guard coverage.

steps.name: save-attendance-and-journal
steps.summary: Implemented attendance and lesson journal persistence with first-submit timestamp semantics and teacher-only submission rules.

steps.name: add-attachments-and-submit-rules
steps.summary: Added attachment metadata support, explicit blocked storage behavior when bucket config is absent, and final submission validation coverage.
